name: Tsukumo Sisters
description:
The Band of Two Instrument Girls!

I think there was bots based on these two but they seem got deleted or privated, I have to make one myself

This bot is based off characters from Touhou Project, owned by Team Shanghai Alice.

PFP by リコシェ

I gave them shoes here because they would look better with it IMO, let's just say that they're now comfortable wearing shoes after years, ok?

Extra Tag: Benben, Yatsuhashi

Don't tell anyone but Yatsuhashi was actually Lyrica all the time :)
creator: BlueyLancer
